ADR 0007 §D: cửa sổ đòi di sản (=1 năm ở calendar 3 mùa). KHÔNG có provenance; cần ablation.
ADR 0007 §E.2: chế độ truyền thừa TRƯỢT điều kiện #2 cổng charter §5 (chi phí=0). KHÔNG phải định chế tự phát. Mọi kết quả phụ thuộc nó phải kèm ablation che_do=tan_ra.
ADR 0007 §D.6: đích của di sản hết hạn. Giá trị cong bị CHẶN fail-closed (sink đổi tên, F-36).
ADR 0007 §B: nhu_cau_deu giữ ĐÚNG semantics phân bổ hiện có. Quy tắc khác = định chế phân phối, phải qua cổng (fail-closed).
P2 mechanism treatment: habitat K theo canopy; false là ablation nhãn-ô legacy. Không phải calibrated fact.
P2 stock ceiling; cần sensitivity sweep, không phải dữ liệu lịch sử hiệu chuẩn.
P2 initial forest-stock fraction.
P2 logistic forest regrowth coefficient.
P2 fraction of remaining biomass recovered as wood when clearing.
P2 labor input for reforestation.
P2 initial biomass fraction after reforestation.
P3 quote-thread expiry window; sensitivity/ablation required before mechanism claim.
P1 safety/capacity cap for concurrently open work orders; sensitivity required.
P1 project expiry horizon; expiry refunds still-held material escrow, while spent labour remains spent.
P1 scenario registry mapping generic projects to existing recipes and ledger flows; not an emergent institution.
P4 rolling demographic observation window; reporting choice, not an economic mechanism.
P4 missing-data threshold for all-population annualized rates.
P4 missing-data threshold for age-specific fertility rate.
P4 minimum death count before reporting age-at-death summary.
P4 dependency-ratio age cutoff; sensitivity required for substantive claims.
P4 disclosed abridged period-life-table bands; not a calibrated historical schedule.
P4 missing-data threshold for a life-table age band.
V3 interface treatment: preflight-rejected targets are filtered before engine execution; legacy scenarios leave this gate off.
V3 crop trade-off: higher total food per field and higher labor requirement than potato; sensitivity required.
V3 crop trade-off: lower labor requirement and lower total food per field than maize; sensitivity required.
V3 shelter exposure/recovery treatment; health feeds existing labor-supply mechanism and is not a calibrated historical estimate.
V3 reporting threshold separating baseline mortality from old-age labels; it does not change mortality hazard.
V4 infrastructure treatment: each living adult must receive 1–10 independent provider requests per tick; this is a coverage/cost condition rather than an economic calibration.
V4 transparent threshold for offering a feasible shelter-project continuation; sensitivity and ablation are required.
V4 cap on already-feasible shelter-project labour contributed by the public safety floor; it does not mint labour or materials.
V5 public residential-lot supply rule; requires capacity sensitivity before any substantive claim.
V5 minimum founding supply of public residential permits; not a calibrated settlement density.
V5 bounded preference list for simultaneous residential-lot allocation; affects collision resolution only.
V5 seeded simultaneous lottery for contested seasonal common-field use; an explicit allocation rule, not an empirical historical fact.
Versioned thin-market treatment: unfilled call-auction orders remain eligible for N sessions; TTL=1/absent is the legacy intratick auction. Requires sensitivity/ablation before mechanism claims.
V6 reproductive-timing treatment: conception-to-delivery delay under the active calendar; not calibrated to a specific population.
V6 earliest elapsed time from delivery to next conception attempt; sensitivity required before substantive fertility claims.
V6 independent twin-delivery draw; declared mechanism parameter with no external calibration in this scenario.
ADR 0009 facts-only interface treatment; false/absent preserves the legacy prompt/tool path.
ADR 0009 v7 marker selects food-first shelter ordering without altering v4-v6 shelter treatment.
ADR 0009 v7 threshold; validator requires [0 health_max).
ADR 0009 v7 maximum incremental floor labour before stricter residual cap.
ADR 0009 generic contract schedule identity is implemented under the v7 gate; it remains a design assumption, not calibration.
ADR 0009 generic tangible-delivery identity is implemented under the v7 gate; it remains a design assumption, not calibration.
